Audio.openal_main_output_device.title: Openal Main Output Device
Audio.openal_main_output_device.help: Controls shadPS4 openal main output device.

Audio.openal_padSpk_output_device.title: Openal Pad Spk Output Device
Audio.openal_padSpk_output_device.help: Controls shadPS4 openal pad spk output device.

Audio.sdl_main_output_device.title: Sdl Main Output Device
Audio.sdl_main_output_device.help: Controls shadPS4 sdl main output device.

Audio.sdl_padSpk_output_device.title: Sdl Pad Spk Output Device
Audio.sdl_padSpk_output_device.help: Controls shadPS4 sdl pad spk output device.

General.extra_dmem_in_mbytes.title: Extra Dmem In Mbytes
General.extra_dmem_in_mbytes.help: Controls shadPS4 extra dmem in mbytes.

GPU.direct_memory_access_enabled.title: Direct Memory Access Enabled
GPU.direct_memory_access_enabled.help: Controls shadPS4 direct memory access enabled.

GPU.readback_linear_images_enabled.title: Readback Linear Images Enabled
GPU.readback_linear_images_enabled.help: Controls shadPS4 readback linear images enabled.

Input.ime_url_mail_short_panel.title: Ime Url Mail Short Panel
Input.ime_url_mail_short_panel.help: Controls shadPS4 ime url mail short panel.

Input.use_mice_as_mice.title: Use Mice As Mice
Input.use_mice_as_mice.help: Controls shadPS4 use mice as mice.

Input.use_unified_input_config.title: Use Unified Input Config
Input.use_unified_input_config.help: Controls shadPS4 use unified input config.

BOX64_ARGS.title: Args
BOX64_ARGS.help: Arguments to pass to the guest program, only valid if there is no existing arguments.

BOX64_INPROCESSGPU.title: Inprocessgpu
BOX64_INPROCESSGPU.help: Add --in-process-gpu argument to the guest program.

BOX64_INSERT_ARGS.title: Insert Args
BOX64_INSERT_ARGS.help: Prepend arguments to the command line.

BOX64_NOSANDBOX.title: Nosandbox
BOX64_NOSANDBOX.help: Add --no-sandbox argument to the guest program.

BOX64_AES.title: Aes
BOX64_AES.help: Expose AES capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_ARCH.title: Arch
BOX64_ARCH.help: Specify the architecture in rcfiles to which the current entry applies. This option only takes effect when used inside rcfiles.

BOX64_AVX.title: Avx
BOX64_AVX.help: Expose AVX extension to CPUID and cpuinfo file. Default value is 2 on Arm64 and LoongArch64 because it's fully implemented in DynaRec, 0 otherwise. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_CPUTYPE.title: Cputype
BOX64_CPUTYPE.help: Specify the CPU type to emulate. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_CRASHHANDLER.title: Crashhandler
BOX64_CRASHHANDLER.help: Use a dummy crash handler or not.

BOX64_DYNAREC_BLEEDING_EDGE.title: Dynarec Bleeding Edge
BOX64_DYNAREC_BLEEDING_EDGE.help: Detect MonoBleedingEdge and apply conservative settings (Linux only).

BOX64_DYNAREC_DIV0.title: Dynarec Div0
BOX64_DYNAREC_DIV0.help: Enable or disable the generation of division-by-zero exception. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_INTERP_SIGNAL.title: Dynarec Interp Signal
BOX64_DYNAREC_INTERP_SIGNAL.help: Allow the use of DynaRec in Signal Handlers.

BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE.title: Dynarec X87 Double
BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE.help: Force the use of float/double for x87 emulation. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_EXIT.title: Exit
BOX64_EXIT.help: Just exit, do not try to run the program.

BOX64_FORCE_LD_PRELOAD.title: Force Ld Preload
BOX64_FORCE_LD_PRELOAD.help: Force symbols from BOX64_LD_PRELOAD libraries to be resolved by RTLD_NEXT.

BOX64_JVM.title: Jvm
BOX64_JVM.help: Detect libjvm and apply conservative settings.

BOX64_LIBCEF.title: Libcef
BOX64_LIBCEF.help: Detect libcef and apply BOX64_MALLOC_HACK settings.

BOX64_MAXCPU.title: Maxcpu
BOX64_MAXCPU.help: Maximum CPU cores exposed. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_NOPERSONA32BITS.title: Nopersona32 Bits
BOX64_NOPERSONA32BITS.help: Disable the automatic switch of personality for 32-bit binaries (always enabled on Box32).

BOX64_NORCFILES.title: Norcfiles
BOX64_NORCFILES.help: Do not load any rc files.

BOX64_PATH.title: Path
BOX64_PATH.help: Path to look for x86_64 binaries.
BOX64_PATH.readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

BOX64_PCLMULQDQ.title: Pclmulqdq
BOX64_PCLMULQDQ.help: Expose PCLMULQDQ capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_PROFILE.title: Profile
BOX64_PROFILE.help: Predefined sets of environment variables with compatibility or performance in mind. Available in WowBox64.
BOX64_PROFILE.readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

BOX64_RCFILE.title: Rcfile
BOX64_RCFILE.help: Path to the rc file to load.

BOX64_RDTSC_INV.title: Rdtsc Inv
BOX64_RDTSC_INV.help: Report Invariant TSC bit in CPUID for Intel CPU type. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_RESERVE_HIGH.title: Reserve High
BOX64_RESERVE_HIGH.help: Reserve high memory area for the program, always enabled on Box32.

BOX64_SDL2_JGUID.title: Sdl2 Jguid
BOX64_SDL2_JGUID.help: Use a workaround for SDL_GetJoystickGUIDInfo function for wrapped SDL2.

BOX64_SHAEXT.title: Shaext
BOX64_SHAEXT.help: Expose SHAEXT (a.k.a. SHA_NI) capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_SSE_FLUSHTO0.title: Sse Flushto0
BOX64_SSE_FLUSHTO0.help: Behaviour of SSE Flush to 0 flags. Also tracking SSE exception flags. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_SSE42.title: Sse42
BOX64_SSE42.help: Expose SSE4.2 capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_STEAM_VULKAN.title: Steam Vulkan
BOX64_STEAM_VULKAN.help: Force Vulkan for Linux Steam UI.

BOX64_SYNC_ROUNDING.title: Sync Rounding
BOX64_SYNC_ROUNDING.help: Synchronize rounding mode between x86 and native.

BOX64_UNITYPLAYER.title: Unityplayer
BOX64_UNITYPLAYER.help: Detect UnityPlayer and apply conservative settings.

BOX64_X11GLX.title: X11 Glx
BOX64_X11GLX.help: Force Xorg GLX extension to be present.

BOX64_X11SYNC.title: X11 Sync
BOX64_X11SYNC.help: Force synchronized operation on X11 display.

BOX64_X11THREADS.title: X11 Threads
BOX64_X11THREADS.help: Call XInitThreads when loading X11. This is mostly for old Loki games with the Loki_Compat library.

BOX64_X87_NO80BITS.title: X87 No80 Bits
BOX64_X87_NO80BITS.help: Behaviour of x87 80bits long double. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DLSYM_ERROR.title: Dlsym Error
BOX64_DLSYM_ERROR.help: Enable or disable the logging of dlsym errors.

BOX64_DUMP.title: Dump
BOX64_DUMP.help: Dump elfloader debug information. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP.title: Dynarec Dump
BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP.help: Enable DynaRec dump. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP_RANGE.title: Dynarec Dump Range
BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP_RANGE.help: Dump DynaRec blocks in the specified range. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_GDBJIT.title: Dynarec Gdbjit
BOX64_DYNAREC_GDBJIT.help: The GDBJIT debugging support, only available on build with -DGDBJIT=ON, enable it with gdb command: jit-reader-load /usr/local/lib/libbox64gdbjitreader.so.

BOX64_DYNAREC_LOG.title: Dynarec Log
BOX64_DYNAREC_LOG.help: Disable or enable DynaRec logs. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_MISSING.title: Dynarec Missing
BOX64_DYNAREC_MISSING.help: Print missing opcodes. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_PERFMAP.title: Dynarec Perfmap
BOX64_DYNAREC_PERFMAP.help: Generate map file for Linux perf tool.

BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST.title: Dynarec Test
BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST.help: Enable DynaRec execution comparison with the interpreter, very slow, only for testing. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST_NODUMP.title: Dynarec Test Nodump
BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST_NODUMP.help: Do not dump test code when BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP is enabled. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST_NODUP.title: Dynarec Test Nodup
BOX64_DYNAREC_TEST_NODUP.help: Enable deduplication of IP address where COSIM find a difference. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_JITGDB.title: Jitgdb
BOX64_JITGDB.help: Launch gdb or not for SIGSEGV, SIGILL, and SIGBUS.

BOX64_LOAD_ADDR.title: Load Addr
BOX64_LOAD_ADDR.help: Set the address where the program is loaded, only active for PIE guest programs.
BOX64_LOAD_ADDR.readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

BOX64_LOG.title: Log
BOX64_LOG.help: Enable or disable Box64 logs, default value is 0 if stdout is not terminal, 1 otherwise. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_NOBANNER.title: Nobanner
BOX64_NOBANNER.help: Disable the Box64 banner. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_NODYNAREC.title: Nodynarec
BOX64_NODYNAREC.help: Forbid DynaBlock creation in the address range specified, helpful for debugging behaviour difference between DynaRec and Interpreter. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_NODYNAREC_DELAY.title: Nodynarec Delay
BOX64_NODYNAREC_DELAY.help: Remove NoDynaRec range after a delay. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_ROLLING_LOG.title: Rolling Log
BOX64_ROLLING_LOG.help: Show last few wrapped function call when a signal is caught.

BOX64_SHOWBT.title: Showbt
BOX64_SHOWBT.help: Show native and emulated backtrace when a signal is caught.

BOX64_TRACE.title: Trace
BOX64_TRACE.help: Only available on box64 build with trace. Adds trace of all instructions executed, along with a register dump.

BOX64_TRACE_COLOR.title: Trace Color
BOX64_TRACE_COLOR.help: Enable or disable colored trace output.

BOX64_TRACE_EMM.title: Trace Emm
BOX64_TRACE_EMM.help: Enable or disable EMM (i.e. MMX) trace output.

BOX64_TRACE_FILE.title: Trace File
BOX64_TRACE_FILE.help: Send all log and trace to a file instead of stdout.

BOX64_TRACE_INIT.title: Trace Init
BOX64_TRACE_INIT.help: Same as BOX64_TRACE but starts the trace immediately.

BOX64_TRACE_START.title: Trace Start
BOX64_TRACE_START.help: Start trace after N opcodes executed.

BOX64_TRACE_XMM.title: Trace Xmm
BOX64_TRACE_XMM.help: Enable or disable XMM (i.e. SSE) trace output.

BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE.title: Dynarec Purge
BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE.help: Purge DynaBlocks that haven't been executed recently, based on tick age threshold (BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE_AGE).

BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE_AGE.title: Dynarec Purge Age
BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE_AGE.help: Tick age threshold for DynaBlock purging (requires BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE=1).

BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT.title: Dynarec Wait
BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT.help: Wait or not for the building of a DynaRec code block to be ready. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER.title: Dynarec Weakbarrier
BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER.help: Tweak the memory barriers to reduce the performance impact by strong memory emulation. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_ADDLIBS.title: Addlibs
BOX64_ADDLIBS.help: Add extras to the needed libraries list, rarely needed.

BOX64_ALLOWMISSINGLIBS.title: Allowmissinglibs
BOX64_ALLOWMISSINGLIBS.help: Allow missing libraries to be ignored.

BOX64_EMULATED_LIBS.title: Emulated Libs
BOX64_EMULATED_LIBS.help: Force the use of emulated libraries.
BOX64_EMULATED_LIBS.readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

BOX64_LD_LIBRARY_PATH.title: Ld Library Path
BOX64_LD_LIBRARY_PATH.help: Path to look for x86_64 libraries.
BOX64_LD_LIBRARY_PATH.readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

BOX64_LD_PRELOAD.title: Ld Preload
BOX64_LD_PRELOAD.help: Force loading libraries with the binary.

BOX64_NOGTK.title: Nogtk
BOX64_NOGTK.help: Do not load wrapped GTK libraries.

BOX64_NOPULSE.title: Nopulse
BOX64_NOPULSE.help: Do not load PulseAudio libraries (both native and x86_64).

BOX64_NOVULKANOVERLAY.title: Novulkanoverlay
BOX64_NOVULKANOVERLAY.help: Do not load x64 Vulkan overlay.

BOX64_PREFER_EMULATED.title: Prefer Emulated
BOX64_PREFER_EMULATED.help: Prefer emulated libraries over native ones.

BOX64_PREFER_WRAPPED.title: Prefer Wrapped
BOX64_PREFER_WRAPPED.help: Prefer wrapped libs first even if the lib is specified with absolute path.

BOX64_WRAP_EGL.title: Wrap Egl
BOX64_WRAP_EGL.help: Prefer wrapped libs for EGL and GLESv2.

BOX64_DYNACACHE.title: Dynacache
BOX64_DYNACACHE.help: Enable/disable the Dynamic Recompiler Cache (a.k.a DynaCache). This option defaults to 2 (to read cache if present but not generate any). DynaCache writes files to the home folder by default, and keeps its folder below BOX64_DYNACACHE_LIMIT when generating new cache files.

BOX64_DYNACACHE_COMPRESS.title: Dynacache Compress
BOX64_DYNACACHE_COMPRESS.help: Compress or not DynaCache files on disk

BOX64_DYNACACHE_FOLDER.title: Dynacache Folder
BOX64_DYNACACHE_FOLDER.help: Set the folder for DynaCache files. Default is $XDG_CACHE_HOME/box64 or $HOME/.cache/box64 if $XDG_CACHE_HOME is not set.

BOX64_DYNACACHE_LIMIT.title: Dynacache Limit
BOX64_DYNACACHE_LIMIT.help: Maximum size, in MiB, for the DynaCache folder. When the limit is exceeded, invalid DynaCache files are removed first, then the oldest valid files are removed if needed. Default size is 2048MiB.

BOX64_DYNACACHE_MIN.title: Dynacache Min
BOX64_DYNACACHE_MIN.help: Minimum size, in KB, for a DynaCache to be written to disk. Default size is 30KB

BOX64_DYNAREC.title: Dynarec
BOX64_DYNAREC.help: Enable/disable the Dynamic Recompiler (a.k.a DynaRec). This option defaults to 1 if it's enabled in the build options for a supported architecture. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_ALIGNED_ATOMICS.title: Dynarec Aligned Atomics
BOX64_DYNAREC_ALIGNED_ATOMICS.help: Generate aligned atomics only (only available on Arm64 for now). Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK.title: Dynarec Bigblock
BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK.help: Enable building bigger DynaRec code blocks for better performance. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET.title: Dynarec Callret
BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET.help: Optimize CALL/RET opcodes. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_DF.title: Dynarec Df
BOX64_DYNAREC_DF.help: Enable or disable the use of deferred flags. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_DIRTY.title: Dynarec Dirty
BOX64_DYNAREC_DIRTY.help: Allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.

BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN.title: Dynarec Fastnan
BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN.help: Enable or disable fast NaN handling. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND.title: Dynarec Fastround
BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND.help: Enable or disable fast rounding. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD.title: Dynarec Forward
BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD.help: Define max allowed forward value when building block. Only 0, 128, 256, 512 and 1024 are valid; other values fall back to 128. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS.title: Dynarec Nativeflags
BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS.help: Enable or disable the use of native flags. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_NOARCH.title: Dynarec Noarch
BOX64_DYNAREC_NOARCH.help: Remove Architecture metadata from DynaRec blocks (used on signal). Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_NOHOTPAGE.title: Dynarec Nohotpage
BOX64_DYNAREC_NOHOTPAGE.help: Disable detection of hot page (where code is executed and data written at the same time).

BOX64_DYNAREC_PAUSE.title: Dynarec Pause
BOX64_DYNAREC_PAUSE.help: Enable x86 PAUSE emulation, may help the performance of spinlocks. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS.title: Dynarec Safeflags
BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS.help: Behaviour of flags emulation on CALL/RET opcodes and other edge cases. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_SEP.title: Dynarec Sep
BOX64_DYNAREC_SEP.help: Optimize CALL/RET further with Secondary Entry Points (SEP). Has no effect if CALLRET is not enabled Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM.title: Dynarec Strongmem
BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM.help: Enable the emulation of x86 strong memory model. Available in WowBox64.

BOX64_DYNAREC_VOLATILE_METADATA.title: Dynarec Volatile Metadata
BOX64_DYNAREC_VOLATILE_METADATA.help: Use volatile metadata parsed from PE files, only valid for 64bit Windows games.

BOX64_MMAP32.title: Mmap32
BOX64_MMAP32.help: Force 32-bit compatible memory mappings on 64-bit programs that run 32-bit code (like Wine WOW64), can improve performance.

BOX64_RDTSC_1GHZ.title: Rdtsc 1 Ghz
BOX64_RDTSC_1GHZ.help: Use hardware counter for rdtsc if available.
